subcodes.first_line: He Who hath been wronged testifieth that thou hast drawn nigh unto the Sacred Place and the Station, and hast visited the House of God, the Sacred Precinct. Blessed art thou inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بانک اقبلت الی المشعر و المقام و زرت بیت الله الحرام طوبی لک بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @law of pilgrimage
